inputs.label: Current Annual Dividend Per Share
inputs.businessContext: The most recent annual dividend payment per share in dollars.

inputs.label: Expected Dividend Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: The anticipated annual growth rate of the dividend, expressed as a percentage.

inputs.label: Required Rate of Return
inputs.businessContext: The investor's required rate of return or discount rate, expressed as a percentage.

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: The number of years into the future for which the dividend is projected.

formulas.presentValue: currentDividend * Math.pow(1 + growthRate / 100, years) / Math.pow(1 + requiredRate / 100, years)
